Previous page PRACTICAL AND ELEGANT Modern design with multiple departments to carry everything you need. Maximum quality La alta calidad de la piel utilizada proporciona una sensación suave y agradable al tacto. Maximum security Advanced technology to keep your cards safe. Large Capacity Multiple cards, department for large and small bills and large purse. Choose your color Various colors, totally black or with a combination inside. Excellent Gift Wrapped in a pretty organic cotton bag and elegant black box. Perfect to give as a gift on any occasion. Next page What type of skin do you use? Top quality Napa: A very soft and elegant leather. A pleasant tactile experience that lasts over time. What is RFID? Advanced technology to keep your cards protected while you travel, shopping or walking. With RFID blocking your cards are protected from theft, unauthorized data and scans Is the wallet comfortable? Yes. A large purse that can fit many coins with a comfortable security opening and closing. You can also use the wallet without having to open the wallet. Does it hold large bills? Yes. You can insert bills of up to £50 without them sticking out when the wallet is closed. How is the wallet made? It is a wallet designed to last a long time. It has double stitching on the outside to prolong its durability and an excellent finish in all its parts. All of this is handcrafted by a small group of master craftsmen.
